# terrible_cisco_dnac_event_series_audit_logs_parent_records_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `category` (String) Category query parameter. Audit Log notification's event category. Supported values INFO, WARN, ERROR, ALERT, TASK_PROGRESS, TASK_FAILURE, TASK_COMPLETE, COMMAND, QUERY, CONVERSATION.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `context` (String) Context query parameter. Audit Log notification's event correlationId.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description query parameter. String full/partial search - (Provided input string is case insensitively matched for records).
- `deviceId` (String) DeviceId query parameter. Audit Log notification's deviceId.
- `domain` (String) Domain query parameter. Audit Log notification's event domain.
- `endTime` (Number) EndTime query parameter. End Time in milliseconds since Epoch Eg. 1597961437211 (when provided startTime is mandatory).
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `eventHierarchy` (String) EventHierarchy query parameter. Audit Log notification's event eventHierarchy. Example "US.CA.San Jose" OR "US.CA" OR "CA.San Jose" - Delimiter for hierarchy separation is ".".
- `eventId` (String) EventId query parameter. Audit Log notification's event ID.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `headers` (String) Additional headers.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `instanceId` (String) InstanceId query parameter. InstanceID of the Audit Log.
- `isSystemEvents` (Boolean) IsSystemEvents query parameter. Parameter to filter system generated audit-logs.
- `limit` (Number) Limit query parameter. Number of Audit Log records to be returned per page. Default is 25 if not specified. Maximum allowed limit is 25.
- `name` (String) Name query parameter. Audit Log notification event name.
- `offset` (Number) Offset query parameter. Position of a particular Audit Log record in the data.
- `order` (String) Order query parameter. Order of the sorted Audit Log records. Default value is desc by timestamp. Supported values asc, desc.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `severity` (String) Severity query parameter. Audit Log notification's event severity. Supported values 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.
- `siteId` (String) SiteId query parameter. Audit Log notification's siteId.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sortBy` (String) SortBy query parameter. Sort the Audit Logs by certain fields. Supported values are event notification header attributes.
- `source` (String) Source query parameter. Audit Log notification's event source.
- `startTime` (Number) StartTime query parameter. Start Time in milliseconds since Epoch Eg. 1597950637211 (when provided endTime is mandatory).
- `subDomain` (String) SubDomain query parameter. Audit Log notification's event sub-domain.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `userId` (String) UserId query parameter. Audit Log notification's event userId.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
